case_title: ARMANDO ROSALES VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-01-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-21-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
